purpose: Bootstrap module that installs Node.js dependencies for the devenv MCP server and registers devenv, github, playwright, and context7 server entries in every detected agent config, always at the scope that auto-loads with no approval: Claude Code user scope (~/.claude.json top-level mcpServers), Codex (~/.codex/config.toml [mcp_servers.*]), and VS Code/Cursor (servers key).
invariants: pnpm must be installed (node group) before this module runs
mcp_register is idempotent — server entries are overwritten with canonical config; all other keys in the target file are preserved
Claude config (~/.claude.json) and Codex config (~/.codex/config.toml) are backed up via backup_file before being modified
Codex servers live in a comment-fenced managed block so re-runs replace it rather than duplicating [mcp_servers.*] tables
gotchas: Claude Code does NOT read ~/.mcp.json from $HOME, and project .mcp.json requires interactive approval; only USER scope (top-level mcpServers in ~/.claude.json) auto-loads everywhere — that is why registration targets ~/.claude.json, not ~/.mcp.json

Enterprise-managed Claude Code enforces an allowedMcpServers allowlist in ~/.claude/remote-settings.json; a server name absent from it (e.g. devenv) will silently fail to load regardless of config scope and won't appear in `claude mcp list`. Codex has no such allowlist.
mcp_install_deps falls back from pnpm install --frozen-lockfile to pnpm install if the lockfile is out of date
The inline Node.js scripts run with --input-type=module; they merge JSON in-process rather than using jq to preserve key order and avoid shell escaping issues
TOML double-quoted strings are literal — the github $(gh auth token) is expanded at launch by `sh -c`, not when the config is written
Adding new tools to manifest/tools.json makes them available without rerunning this module — only an agent restart is needed
github, playwright, and context7 servers are registered alongside devenv but their binaries (gh, npx) must already be on PATH

key_functions.name: mcp_install_deps
key_functions.summary: Runs pnpm install in mcp-server/ to install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk and its dependencies

key_functions.name: mcp_register
key_functions.summary: Registers the four MCP servers into Claude Code (user scope), Codex, and VS Code/Cursor configs, each via a format-specific writer

key_functions.name: _mcp_write_claude_fmt
key_functions.summary: Merges the servers into top-level mcpServers of a Claude JSON config (user scope), backing up first and preserving all other keys

key_functions.name: _mcp_write_codex_fmt
key_functions.summary: Writes the servers as [mcp_servers.*] TOML tables inside an idempotent comment-fenced managed block in ~/.codex/config.toml

key_functions.name: _mcp_write_vscode_fmt
key_functions.summary: Merges the servers into the VS Code/Cursor servers key (type:stdio)
